name: TANSH Global Food Group Co., Ltd
summary: TANSH Global Food Group Co., Ltd, an investment holding company, operates a chain of restaurants in Mainland China and Hong Kong. The company operates 55 Shanghai Min restaurants, 2 Maison DeL'Hui restaurants, 22 the dining room restaurants, 1 Oreno restaurant, 1 Wolfgang Puck restaurants, 1 COCO2NUTS, 3 AYO MAYA, and 1 DOUTOR caf√É¬©. It is also involved in the management of restaurants; provision of management services; franchise operation; sale of software; and provision of IT technology services. The company was formerly known as Xiao Nan Guo Restaurants Holdings Limited and changed its name to TANSH Global Food Group Co., Ltd in June 2017. TANSH Global Food Group Co., Ltd was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
